final:
module binary_counter_3bit(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [2:0] count);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst)
            count <= 3'b000; // Synchronous reset
        else
            count <= count + 1; // Increment counter on each clock pulse
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
